name: PISSed Off: Peeing Simulator
short_description: Another job simulator at the top of Steam, seriously? Piss on work and a bunch of dumbass simulators in this game!
detailed_description:
All other simulators can PISS off, the real deal is here.

Looking for the ultimate stream on Steam? Want a relief? Or a way to relieve yourself?

TheraPEE was never an option, peeing is the only way.

You think we’re taking the piss? No, we really made this game. You may call it PEEople pleasing, but we’re just trying to create a simulator that really matters. Other simulators may want to shower you with promises, but our shower is especially golden.

Most sPEEctacular simulator you can play is here.

Once you start playing, you'll realise that URINE a PEEckle.

The one and only (seriously, you can’t repeat it, but maybe you can rePEE it).

PEEriod.

Features:

  • Toilet humor without the toilets

  • Space for the creativity of your inner child

  • Conditionally infinite fun (until everything gets pissed on)

  • The ability to piss on simulator developers in 8 different ways

  • Visitors who don't like each other but want fresh urine

  • Zombies who don't like you, visitors or urine. They like to attack. That's it.

  • Different kinds of piss for different tastes: political, anime, meme, etc.
